attacking_style: Shows willingness to attack early in breakaways but has learned tactical restraint, transitioning from aggressive self-interest to calculated team play in final kilometers.
team_tactics: In AG2R setup, executes deliberate pacing in breaks to position teammates for final kilometer launches, sacrificing personal placement for team success.
terrain_preference: Capable in breakaways on climbing stages, though specific terrain advantage unclear from limited data; can handle sustained efforts in escapes.
vulnerability: Historically exposed when attacking too early in breakaways, depleting reserves before decisive moments on subsequent climbs.
key_patterns: Participates in long-range breakaways across Grand Tours, 2 observed instances.
Tactical evolution from premature attacks (2019) to disciplined team sacrifice (2023).
Final kilometer positioning important; either depleted or deliberately pacing for teammates.
form_trajectory: positive: Evolution from tactically naive early attacks to sophisticated team player executing planned sacrificial roles for AG2R
